docs.title: Joseph (Zhuoran) Wang
docs.text:
type Me struct{}
// TODO: This method is far from complete.
func (m *Me) Week(paper *Paper, project *Project) error {
    report, err := paper.Read()
    if err != nil {
        return err
    }
    note, err := report.Note()
    if err != nil {
        return err
    }
    progress, err := project.Exec()
    if err != nil {
        return err
    }
    if err := m.Meeting(note, progress); err != nil {
        return err
    }
    return nil
}

Contact me: wang{fill in with my last name}200105@126.com

docs.title: An implementation of distributed SQL Engine supporting AI model
docs.text:
• Intended to implement a simple distributed computing system with supporting SQL querying CSV data
  • Supporting RBO, CBO and distributed task scheduling
  • Extended the SQL language to a AI-oriented declarative language to support direct calling of AI models

  • Conducted Standup meetings every day and monitored project daily progress using the burnout diagram
